title: 11/14/23 - PPLS #2
content:
This split was made across 2 weeks:

Week #1

 

Mon: Pull

  1. Deadlift motion: Conventional deadlifts
  2. Row motion: T-Bar rows
  3. Lateral motion: Pull-ups
  4. Curl motion: Standing barbell curl
  5. Upper abs workout (4-5 sets of the following)

 

Tues: Push

  1. Chest press motion: Flat bench press
  2. Incline press motion: Incline dumbbell press
  3. Pushup motion: Dips
  4. Fly motion: Peck deck / machine flies
  5. Tricep extension motion: Skull crushers
  6. Lower abs workout (4-5 sets of the following)

 

Wed: Rest

 

Thurs: Shoulders

  1. Overhead press motion: Military press
  2. Rear deltoid motion: Rear deltoid flies
  3. Lateral raise motion: Dumbbell lateral raises
  4. Carry motion: Farmer carry
  5. Upper abs workout (4-5 sets of the following)

 

Fri: Legs

  1. Squat motion: Back squat
  2. One-legged squat motion: Pistol squat
  3. Leg extension motion: Leg extension
  4. Hamstring motion: Leg curls
  5. Lower abs workout (4-5 sets of the following)

 

Sat: Rest

 

Sun: 5K Run

  • Average time is around 30:00, still working on this aspect of my training regimen

 

Week #2:

 

Mon: Pull

  1. Deadlift motion: Romanian deadlifts (RDLs)
  2. Row motion: Wide grip cable Rows
  3. Lateral motion: Lat pull-downs
  4. Curl motion: Incline dumbbell curl
  5. Upper abs workout (2-3 sets of the following)

 

Tues: Push

  1. Chest press motion: Flat dumbbell press
  2. Incline press motion: Incline bench press
  3. Pushup motion: Pushups
  4. Fly motion: Lying flies
  5. Tricep extension motion: Overhead tricep extensions
  6. Lower abs workout (2-3 sets of the following)

 

Wed: Rest

 

Thurs: Shoulders

  1. Overhead press motion: Dumbbell shoulder press
  2. Rear deltoid motion: Rear deltoid flies
  3. Lateral raise motion: Dumbbell lateral raises
  4. Carry motion: One-handed kettlebell carry
  5. Upper abs workout (2-3 sets of the following)

 

Fri: Legs

  1. Squat motion: Hack squat
  2. One-legged squat motion: Pistol squat
  3. Leg extension motion: Leg extension
  4. Hamstring motion: Leg curls
  5. Lower abs workout (2-3 sets of the following)

 

Sat: Rest

 

Sun: 5K Run

  • Average time is around 30:00, still working on this aspect of my training regimen

  3. Shoulder press

  • 3+ miles
  • Meant to build endurance
